~/projects/lunara
October 2025 - Present

Lunara

AI-powered triage system for healthcare, winning 1st place at Rutgers HealthHack 2025. Currently working with Rutgers on a completer program to bring to production.

★ 1st · Rutgers HealthHack 2025running

PerishLess

Rova

# tradeoffs that keep showing up in this lane

> Decisions

# Ship a real React + API loop early, then harden auth, storage, and deployment. Prefer boring, known stacks (Vite, FastAPI, Postgres/Firebase) so most of the risk sits in product logic, not framework novelty.

# which --all $TOOLS — the parts of the arsenal this topic leans on

> Tools Used

ReactTypeScriptJavaScriptNode.jsFastAPIViteTailwindCSSDocker
